Container.Name: wyoming-s2cpp-tts
Container.Overview:
CPU-only Wyoming Protocol TTS wrapper for s2.cpp backend.
This container runs the Python Wyoming TCP server that translates Home Assistant Wyoming TTS requests into buffered multipart/form-data HTTP calls to the already-running s2.cpp backend (s2cpp-backend container on sorilonet).
This image does NOT require NVIDIA runtime, CUDA, or GPU hardware. It does NOT bundle GGUF models or build s2.cpp.
Home Assistant connects to this container at: 192.168.1.45:<host port> (unless Home Assistant is itself on sorilonet, in which case use container-name:10200).
The s2cpp-backend container must be running before this wrapper. Wyoming protocol streaming with true progressive frame-level backend-audio forwarding is active when S2_STREAM=true. Previously sentence-buffered; now defaults to frame-level progressive synthesis.

Config.Name: Wyoming TCP Host Port
Config.Description: Host port mapped to the Wyoming TCP container port (10200). Home Assistant connects to 192.168.1.45:<this port> unless HA is on sorilonet.

Config.Name: TTS Backend
Config.Description: Backend mode: 's2cpp' for real synthesis, 'fake' for deterministic local PCM test tones (development only).

Config.Name: Backend Host
Config.Description: Hostname of the s2.cpp HTTP backend container (must be on the same Docker network). Default: s2cpp-backend.

Config.Name: Backend Port
Config.Description: HTTP port of the s2.cpp backend (default: 3030). The backend generates audio at http://s2cpp-backend:3030/generate.

Config.Name: Streaming
Config.Description: Enables progressive frame-level backend audio streaming. When true, audio chunks arrive as generated rather than buffered per-sentence.

Config.Name: Wyoming URI
Config.Description: Wyoming TCP listen address and port inside the container. Changing the port requires a matching Port mapping above.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Application log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error.

Config.Name: Segment Sentences
Config.Description: When true, splits text into sentences and synthesizes each separately (buffered per-sentence). When false, uses raw frame-level progressive synthesis for lower first-audio latency. Set to true only if progressive synthesis causes quality issues.

Config.Name: Codec Context Frames
Config.Description: Codec streaming decode context window in frames. Lower values reduce total synthesis time but may affect audio quality. Any non-negative integer accepted (upstream API minimum 0, no enum). Context 32 is the provisional quality baseline. Higher = better quality, slower.

Config.Name: Voice Directory
Config.Description: Directory inside the container where .s2voice profile files are mounted. Must match the backend voice directory and the host mount path.

Config.Name: Default Voice
Config.Description: Optional default voice profile ID (e.g. cmu_bdl_male_us). Leave empty to use the generic s2-pro backend fallback when no voice is requested.

Config.Name: Voices Host Path
Config.Description: Host directory for .s2voice profile files. Mounted read-only in the wrapper; profiles are created by the backend container.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Host directory for wrapper runtime data (currently reserved for future use).

Config.Name: Stream Decode Stride
Config.Description: Streaming decode stride in frames. Higher values (2, 4, 8) reduce CUDA launch overhead by decoding more frames per step at the cost of slightly higher first-audio latency. Lower value (1) matches legacy low_latency behavior. Accepted range: 1-64. Default: 4 (balanced).

Config.Name: Stream Holdback Frames
Config.Description: Number of frames to hold back before streaming output. Higher values accumulate more audio before first chunk emission. 0 = no intentional holdback. Non-negative integer.

Config.Name: Stream Start Buffer MS
Config.Description: Initial buffer duration in milliseconds before audio streaming begins. Higher values reduce underrun risk but increase first-audio latency. 0 = no initial buffer. Non-negative integer.

Config.Name: Initial Buffer MS
Config.Description: Wrapper initial buffer duration in milliseconds. 0 = no buffering (progressive streaming). Non-negative integer.

Config.Name: Low Latency Mode
Config.Description: Enable backend low-latency streaming mode. When true, backend emits audio frames as soon as available rather than batching. Set to false only if audio quality issues are observed.

Config.Name: Temperature
Config.Description: Sampling temperature (0.0-2.0). Lower values = more deterministic, higher = more creative. Default: 0.58.

Config.Name: Top-P
Config.Description: Nucleus sampling probability threshold (0.0-1.0). Default: 0.88.

Config.Name: Top-K
Config.Description: Top-K sampling: only consider top K tokens. Range: 1-200. Default: 40.

Config.Name: Max New Tokens
Config.Description: Maximum number of new tokens to generate per synthesis request. Range: 1-4096. Default: 512.

Config.Name: Backend Busy Max Retries
Config.Description: Maximum additional HTTP 503 retries after initial attempt (default 10 means 11 total attempts). Range: 1-10.

Config.Name: Backend Busy Retry Delay MS
Config.Description: Milliseconds between backend-busy retries. Range: 0-10000.

Config.Name: Queue Wait Timeout Sec
Config.Description: Maximum seconds a request waits in the synthesis queue before timing out. Range: 0-300.

Config.Name: Synthesis Timeout Sec
Config.Description: Maximum seconds for backend synthesis before timeout. Range: 0.1-600.
